name: Chicken and Pepperoni Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 88 g chicken breast (boneless, cut into bite-size pieces)
3 tsp garlic powder or fresh garlic cloves to taste
Diced onions (if using, dried or powdered)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of olive oil in a frying skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and sprinkle the first portions of pepperoni and oregano over it.
2. Cook the chicken until almost done. Add the pepperoni and cook until hot,
then remove from heat and let drain excess oil.
3. Lower the heat, add tomato sauce and remaining spices, and simmer.
4. Serve hot over pasta, sprinkling shredded mozzarella on top if desired.
Difficulty: easy. Precision: approximate measurements.
